description: Canonical target-shape fixture for a turn that invokes agent.google_search via the migrated mode='task' path (AH-PRD-15 §7.2 AC #2 / AH-118). This fixture covers the specialist-assignment path (AH-115) as the baseline: google_analytics_specialist receives request_task_google_search as a tool, invokes the google_search_agent mode='task' leaf, and the inner google_search grounded-search tool calls appear as emitted spans in the outer stream. The root-assignment path (AH-116) is architecturally identical at the leaf level — only the parent context (root vs. specialist) differs; if MER-E requires a discriminating fixture for that path, add a sibling fixture in a follow-up issue (see D-A2 in the AH-118 Implementation Plan). Every span carries emission_status='emitted' or 'deferred'. The google.genai LLM-call span (generate_content inside the task-mode leaf) is emission_status='deferred' — this is a carry-forward from the pre-existing Weave autopatch fragility on both ADK 1.34.1 and 2.0.0 (see deferred_reason, docs/trace-structure-spec.md §4.5, AH-PRD-13 §9, and the AH-113 §5 results table row google_genai_autopatch=False). The grounded-search tool spans are emission_status='emitted' — these are the primary observability signal for AC #2 and the key extraction target for MER-E quality scoring. MER-E extractors must treat 'deferred' spans and fields as absent in live traces until their owning follow-up ships. node_path in the google_search_agent task-mode leaf summary is sourced verbatim from AH-99 probe-1 evidence: docs/spike-adk2-supervisor-orchestration-live.md §4 ('coordinator@1/task_specialist@adk-…' pattern); scope here is google_analytics_specialist@1/task_specialist@adk-<uuid>. Conformance test: app/adk/tracking/tests/test_google_search_task_mode_fixture.py. Live-verification runbook: docs/runs/AH-118-google-search-trace-coverage.md.

children.name: google_analytics_specialist_worker

deferred_summary.specialist_output: Based on a web search for recent marketing performance trends, here are the key findings: (1) Q2 2026 sees increased paid search CPCs across retail verticals; (2) organic click-through rates improved 8% YoY for informational queries; (3) video content engagement rates are outperforming static display by 3x on mobile.

children.deferred_reason: The google_analytics_specialist_worker agent span IS emitted today (weave_before/after callbacks propagated from build_agent), but weave_after_agent_callback writes only output={status, text} and leaves summary empty. The iteration-level annotations under 'deferred_summary' (iteration, specialist_output) are NOT yet written. Deferred — see trace-structure-spec.md §14.2.

input.query: Q2 2026 marketing performance trends paid search CPC organic traffic

results.title: 2026 Q2 Digital Marketing Benchmarks Report
results.snippet: Paid search CPCs in retail verticals increased an average of 12% in Q2 2026 vs Q1, driven by intensified competition and rising consumer intent signals.

results.title: Organic Search CTR Trends 2026
results.snippet: Informational query click-through rates improved 8% YoY in H1 2026, with AI-assisted featured snippets now claiming the top 3 positions in 41% of SERP pages.

input.query: 2026 mobile video content engagement vs display advertising performance

results.title: Video vs Display Ad Performance 2026
results.snippet: Short-form video content is generating 3x higher engagement rates than static display on mobile devices in 2026, with completion rates averaging 68% for sub-30s formats.

children.name: generate_content
children.deferred_reason: The google.genai LLM-call span (google.genai.generate_content) inside the google_search_agent task-mode leaf is absent due to a Weave autopatch fragility on both ADK 1.34.1 and 2.0.0 — the google.genai module integration does not register in all execution environments. This is a pre-existing condition predating the ADK 2.0 migration, classified as a non-blocking carry-forward by AH-PRD-13 §9 and documented in docs/trace-structure-spec.md §4.5 + docs/runs/AH-113-adk2-weave-verification.md §2 (google_genai_autopatch=False). If a future Weave or google.genai release fixes the autopatch on ADK 2.0, flip this span to 'emitted', update test_emitted_spans_are_exactly_the_runtime_set in the conformance test, and remove the §4.5 carry-forward note. Deferred — see docs/trace-structure-spec.md §4.5 and AH-PRD-13 §9.

children.name: google_analytics_specialist_review_reviewer
children.deferred_reason: The reviewer LlmAgent (app/adk/agents/utils/review_pipeline.py) is constructed with no before/after agent callbacks, so weave_before_agent_callback never runs for it and NO *_review_reviewer span is emitted in live traces. The 'summary' below is the target shape only. Deferred — see trace-structure-spec.md §14.2.
